author: @makergc3d
text: Having just discovered your channel, it is fascinating! Did you commercialize this? Are you able to distribute the formula for making the dry soap powder or is it an off the shelf product? I hope you see this comment and are able to respond given that the video is aged by 10 years. Thank you.

author: @Ghosthawk332nd
text:
Ok, you sold me. Now, point me to where I can buy it in the USA, with the bottle for a reasonable price. A list of ingredients would be nice too. :)

Love following what you are working on. And yes I think the Eco-foam has real potential. 

Anything that will cut moly grease like that is a winner. 

Call me Wild Bill, Jack of all trades, master of procrastination and google.
Grin

author: @Pelukeitor
text:
Robert si tu detergente "EcoFoam" consigue despegar el grafito  de cualquier superficie, tambien se podrá usar para sonicar el oxido de grafeno y hacer que se disuelva antes :-)
(con un poco).


Robert if your detergent EcoFoam manages to take off any surface graphite, also can use to sonicar the graphene oxide and make it to dissolve before :-)
(with a little).
